name: Paul Davis
subject: To the fighters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas |
body:
Dear Peter,

To all the moms out there who fight for their kids everyday, especially my wife, Stephanie, and mom, Kathy, have a happy Mother's Day!

-Paul Davis

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Are you coming to dinner?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
I’m inviting one patriot and a friend. |
---
| | | | | | | | [ ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=104e82a9c1deeb6d414b32b314ea76d63245f20bfd1b58ad6c3ee2547322807faf208f0a892ac7f6c1f822b3187662ca146bfcfe53a8f604)
---

Friend,

I want you to enter for the chance to meet me for dinner in New York City.

If you win, I'll cover your flight, your stay, and the dinner. You can even bring a friend or a family member and we'll all take a picture together so that we can both remember this moment and show it to our loved ones.

---
| **[Contribute just $1 to be automatically entered to win.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=90be176087f0fd948c5c700025604d76cf4ec3953d99b69ad2d3e15d6097d68e7acfceebfab637d54506c8b3d6cf2ccb328a7b2cd34100f4)**
** [CONTRIBUTE $15](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=90be176087f0fd9407cd67b139e92ac4df783e157c9c9f45661e653aa56da34513b8893f1c15ba85856a352868864cbe51501010f0fb361a)** ** [CONTRIBUTE $10](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=90be176087f0fd94f8c4c3b19ce1649388196a23a58cd4c3dd10def21243dd08262c0abcb7efd00316f2e4b2dd869e3fc8985fb335978d5a)** ** [CONTRIBUTE $5](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=90be176087f0fd945fdb39731bc420922111255ddcb3535314c70e095983eae4d671448427c042a90cb2ffbfbb295727a4a71645884bd72d)** ** [CONTRIBUTE $1](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=90be176087f0fd946e34430735936d6ae49e14740d67707b773122c8d3ec7db694101c49b50fb34da8e9a219307343e529e2f90b2f0d952c)** ** [CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=90be176087f0fd94caa64bef23f4b63f4692a0d3ed1ea1376a6ba8c7c59d15ec87ded688059f2ff0367d1805e64c83307401f8ae6091be76)**
You have truly been a loyal supporter of the Make America Great Again Agenda.

I would love to meet you, and there is no better time and place than on May 23rd in the Big Apple.

**[Please contribute as little as $1 and be automatically entered to win a dinner and photo with me.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=90be176087f0fd94feace96bdfd64ea5116f011046c0c74497bc993954077384fdb5d924ffe0255e7dbb9a578787ac778db961f18878aa65) **
Thank you,

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=90be176087f0fd94eed71788d11b4ff6b039cb9d00084f8278b038de82db1f20a10a327faddeca1d9c5f517de41977d28ed527605927b276)
Donald J. Trump
President of the United States of America
[CONTRIBUTE $1](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=90be176087f0fd949da025ec68872e3b95e2bb6cc7867baaee3de3c20f68b436556c0c754517cb9c5343909e040d8a5f458d3c099196d782)
---

Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Trump Make America Great Again by clicking [here](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=90be176087f0fd9487b0c475c7f4e20d9d8325c7b1f64a70b82f2c7787a7f838ce1ddbf9f4ddbe3e03f52288c3a880633a51e929bc13457c). Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking [here ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=90be176087f0fd94276f5c50e3a1f073ee78e1df8a1eb36d8790b40799615cba378b7db10d911ddc8886c45cce6ce29bc6d4b586578699cd). Entries must be received between May 12, 2018 at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and May 18, 2018 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winners will receive round-trip transportation and accommodations and tickets to attend a dinner with President Trump at the Trump Victory Dinner in New York City (approximate retail value $3000). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit [here](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=90be176087f0fd9461803f51baabd4a9ab6566e85836d9f24e9a03165f6c8408c7bd66277850511f99610d9ec340b895502d05db104e4749) for full details and Official Rules. Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again Committee and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=90be176087f0fd949389d9c3864c138e73ae0c1c750b79d1bc7a5d2b0747c12c09ca95915dc8e264d7e809bf4f20a3cf9f9614486e9495b3) | [Unsubscribe](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=9b3e05efd8bd05fc308bdcdb8306d7f502107564d038016ca6bd80247da313f712ff71afa2c3f47dd57978e0f0bd178fea328351a9987cc5ea646d1ab91095e5) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=9b3e05efd8bd05fccf6ebf77cd5e8ea547e65639e0dc256c00f693ea13e977bd6c84c58c0eb9dfc76d3b0dbb250afce4855bc7960f11576edc9d0e73a8ca9d7e)

name: Dave Leroy
subject: We Would Like to Congratulate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leroy For Idaho; Richard A Howard, Treasurer
body:
---

| | Dear Friend, I would like to congratulate my campaign manager Lincoln Smyser and his wife Kelly on the birth of their two beautiful twins Hudson and Harper. Lincoln has been an amazing asset to the campaign and has worked tirelessly over the past year. Thank you Lincoln, let’s hope we can celebrate again on May 15th! We are only **3 days** from the May 15th Republican primary. We still have a few opportunities for you to help us get out the vote! A contribution can help us buy last-minute radio or TV ads. **[Contribute $50, $100, $200, $500, or $1,000 here.](http://daveleroy.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jyddklkd-kulrqjyiu-y/)** On **Monday, May 14th** we will be having our **last phone bank from 5:30 - 7:30 pm** in suite 1460 of the Zions Bank building, 800 West Main Street. Please call **(208) 949-6778** if you would like to sign up. We also need volunteers to wave signs at busy intersections around the Treasure Valley on Tuesday, May 15th. Join us in the morning before work or in the afternoon. Call **(208) 949-6778** to get signed up today! Thank you for your friendship and support!
\- Dave [**Volunteer **](http://daveleroy.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jyddklkd-kulrqjyiu-j/) [**Donate**](http://daveleroy.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jyddklkd-kulrqjyiu-t/) |
---|---|---

[](http://daveleroy.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jyddklkd-kulrqjyiu-i/) [](http://daveleroy.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jyddklkd-kulrqjyiu-d/)

Paid for by Leroy For Idaho; Richard A Howard, Treasurer

[UNSUBSCRIBE](http://daveleroy.cmail19.com/t/r-u-jyddklkd-kulrqjyiu-r/)

name: Amanda Brown Lierman
subject: Take 2 minutes → Watch our Mother's Day video
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
Our team put together a video about Belle and my experience being a mom at the DNC. I hope you'll take two minutes to watch it:
---
When I waddled into the Democratic National Committee at seven months pregnant, I didn't quite know what I was getting myself into. I just knew that I wanted to take a job that would create a better world and a better future for my daughter, Belle.

I'm the Political and Organizing Director at the DNC, but most importantly, I am Belle's mom. My job is not only about winning elections -- it's about working around the clock to ensure I have a healthy little girl at home.

**For Mother's Day, our team put together a special video about Belle -- and my experience being a mom at the DNC. I hope you'll take two minutes to watch it.**

[](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522f22/4067b0a/597b5f76a/7e44c84e/405767937/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mothers-day-video?noskip=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em_20180513_abl_nd&source=em_20180513_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180513_abl_nd")
**[ WATCH NOW](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522f22/4067b0a/597b5f76a/7e44c84f/405767937/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mothers-day-video?noskip=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+WATCH+NOW&utm_campaign=em_20180513_abl_nd&source=em_20180513_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180513_abl_nd")
** Since I joined the DNC, we've had the chance to celebrate historic victories in some of the reddest states -- electing Democrats who can fight for families like mine and yours for years to come. My daughter Belle has been an important part of that journey.

She attended the Women's March and the March for Our Lives, she was by our side when Doug Jones won in Alabama, and as she grows up, I want her to know her power and her role in this country.

I hope she'll be part of a generation that speaks up for what they believe in and continues the fight for women's rights. We need paid family leave, better child care policies, and equal pay for equal work. But none of that will happen unless we elect more Democrats across the country this year.

**[Take two minutes to watch our video -- and share it with the politically-minded mothers in your life.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522f22/4067b0a/597b5f76a/7e44c84c/405767937/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mothers-day-video?noskip=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+Take+two+minutes+to+watch+our+video++and&utm_campaign=em_20180513_abl_nd&source=em_20180513_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180513_abl_nd")**

Happy Mother's Day!

Amanda

Amanda Brown Lierman
Political and Organizing Director
Democratic National Committee

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www.Democrats.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't your preferred email address, [update your contact information](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522f22/4067b0a/597b5f76a/7e44c84d/405767937/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180513_abl_nd&source=em_20180513_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180513_abl_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522f22/4067b0a/597b5f76a/7e44c84a/405767937/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180513_abl_nd&source=em_20180513_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180513_abl_nd"). Click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522f22/4067b0a/597b5f76a/7e44c84b/405767937/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180513_abl_nd&source=em_20180513_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180513_abl_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522f22/4067b0a/597b5f76a/7e44c848/405767937/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180513_abl_nd&source=em_20180513_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180513_abl_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Joe Donnelly
subject: We can do more on Mother's Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
The fact is, our country has a long way to go on maternal health care. Our maternal mortality rates are among the highest in the developed world, and there are even larger racial disparities within th |
---

| | Peter,

On Mother's Day, we thank the moms in our lives for everything they've done for us. But there's more we can do: **We can make sure every new mother in Indiana has access to health care that will ensure a healthy pregnancy and birth.**

One of the great things about Indiana's HIP 2.0 program is its coverage for pregnant women, which lasts until 60 days after childbirth. 50% of births in Indiana are covered by Medicaid, which was expanded by HIP 2.0 -- that's a lot of moms and babies!

So it's all the more concerning that there are plenty of people in Washington who would see HIP 2.0 dismantled or destroyed. That's exactly what would have happened if Mitch McConnell's health care bill had passed last year -- which is why I was so opposed to it.

The fact is, our country has a long way to go on maternal health care. Our maternal mortality rates are among the highest in the developed world, and there are even larger racial disparities within that rate. But to solve the problem, we need to expand expecting mothers' access to better quality health care -- not dismantle the program that provides care to so many women.

**[This Mother's Day, will you add your name in support of HIP 2.0 and health coverage for pregnant women?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2140/7377f838/3f551dac/51f96d1a/1009066568/VEsH/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/s/health-coverage-for-pregnant-women")**

Happy Mother's Day,
Joe |
---|---|---

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206
[Unsubscribe](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2140/7377f838/3f551dac/51f96d15/1009066568/VEsE/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/unsubscribe")

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Today is their day
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb30b9/9e00690/472f2563/24021ebc/89141200/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180511_MomDay_acq_gq_act__AG&source=em18_180511_MomDay_acq_gq_act__AG")
Friends,

I wouldn't be where I am today without the support and love from the three most important women in my life.

My mother worked hard to support my family as a bus driver, and she never stopped fighting for my siblings and me to have every opportunity to break the cycle of poverty. My grandmother instilled in me a sense of responsibility that life was not just about me, but also about lifting up your community.

My amazing wife is not only the mother of our three beautiful children -- she's my beacon of strength, guidance, and wisdom -- and I don't know where I'd be without her.

Women -- like my grandmother, mother, and wife -- shape us into the people we are today. They always seem to have the right words to say and remind us of who we are when times get tough. They deserve recognition not only on this special day, but every day of the year.
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb30b9/9e00690/472f2563/24021ebf/89141200/VEsE/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/happy-mothers-day?gpsid=13_55_477&source=em18_180511_MomDay_acq_gq_act__AG&utm_campaign=em18_180511_MomDay_acq_gq_act__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2")
---
**[Today is their day -- so join me in wishing all moms, maternal figures, and strong women out there a Happy Mother's Day.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb30b9/9e00690/472f2563/24021ebe/89141200/VEsF/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/happy-mothers-day?gpsid=13_55_477&source=em18_180511_MomDay_acq_gq_act__AG&utm_campaign=em18_180511_MomDay_acq_gq_act__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=3+-+Today+is+their+day++so+join+me+in+wishin")**
Andrew

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
1550 Melvin Street,
Tallahassee, FL 32303

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb30b9/9e00690/472f2563/24021eb1/89141200/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=4+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em18_180511_MomDay_acq_gq_act__AG"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb30b9/9e00690/472f2563/24021eb0/89141200/VEsD/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=5+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em18_180511_MomDay_acq_gq_act__AG&source=em18_180511_MomDay_acq_gq_act__AG"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb30b9/9e00690/472f2563/24021eb3/89141200/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=6+-+You+can+support+our+campaign+by+making+a&utm_campaign=em18_180511_MomDay_acq_gq_act__AG&source=em18_180511_MomDay_acq_gq_act__AG")
clean_body: "" Friends, I wouldn't be where I am today without the support and love from the three most important women in my life. My mother worked hard to support my family as a bus driver, and she never stopped fighting for my siblings and me to have every opportunity to break the cycle of poverty. My grandmother instilled in me a sense of responsibility that life was not just about me, but also about lifting up your community. My amazing wife is not only the mother of our three beautiful children -- she's my beacon of strength, guidance, and wisdom -- and I don't know where I'd be without her. Women -- like my grandmother, mother, and wife -- shape us into the people we are today. They always seem to have the right words to say and remind us of who we are when times get tough. They deserve recognition not only on this special day, but every day of the year. "" "" Andrew Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor. Andrew Gillum for Governor 1550 Melvin Street, Tallahassee, FL 32303

name: Team Kasich
subject: The Latest
body:
Before we get into the updates, we wanted to take a moment to
wish all of the Moms out there a very Happy Mothers Day!

Peter - Before we get into the
updates, we wanted to take a moment to wish all of the Moms out
there a very Happy Mother's Day!

The Latest

Following the disparaging
comments made about Sen. John McCain's health by a White House
staffer, Gov. Kasich issued the following statement:

The Future is Here

Ohio has been one of the leading
states in embracing new technologies like autonomous vehicles
that are rapidly going from science fiction to reality.

Just last week, Gov. Kasich
signed an Executive Order that will pave the way for more testing
of these technologies in the Buckeye State.

Innovation leads to jobs,
investment in communities and diversifies our economy. Ohio is
again setting an example for other states and the nation to
follow.

The Iran Deal

Following President Trump's
decision to withdraw the United States from the Joint
Comprehensive Plan of Action, Gov. Kasich issued the following
statement?

"President Trump's decision to
withdraw from the Joint Comprehensive Plan of Action (JCPOA) was
a mistake. It has gotten us nothing other than to remove
constraints on Iran's ability to produce nuclear weapons. Our
allies, including the commander of the Israeli Defense Forces,
believe that, while this deal is not perfect, it is essential to
constraining Tehran from such a move.

President Trump's rejection of
the deal creates disunity and separates us from our allies at a
time when we need to be rallying together to confront a myriad of
challenges from Russia, China and in the Middle East."

Celebrating a Free Press

Gov. Kasich accepted an
invitation to speak at the Michigan Press Association's closing
session of their 150th anniversary convention.

The governor has been a very
vocal advocate of the critical role an independent media fills in
America. The attacks on the foundations of our democracy eat away
at our freedoms.

Voices of Support

We were intrigued by a recent
column written by former Montana Secretary of State and State
Senate President Bob Brown. Read the op-ed (here)

May Goal

Gov. Kasich continues to be a
leading voice calling for civility in our public discourse and
for our leaders to toss politics aside and focus on finding
solutions that improve the lives of Americans.

But we're counting on your
ongoing support to ensure that we have the tools to continue
fighting for this.

Please consider chipping in $10,
$25, $50 or more to help us hit our April fundraising goal.

--

Thank you for all that you're
doing to help!
-Team Kasich

Paid for by Kasich
for America
www.JohnKasich.com

Paid for by Kasich for America

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

You were added on July 18, 2015 and you can learn more about how you
were added by clicking here: http://email.sermodigital.com/p/iWtq0USVNm

If you would like to send this message to some of your friends,
you can click here to do so: http://email.sermodigital.com/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=10852205&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=933663ca3f741b59c37ac8fc9a0afde3&schema=echo3

If you believe you received this message in error or no longer
wish to receive emails from Kasich for America, simply click to
unsubscribe. http://email.sermodigital.com/p/oWtq0USVNm

name: Mike Stack
subject: The Veterans Task Force
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee to Elect Mike Stack
body:
| [](http://action.stackforpa.com/page/m/5fc045fb/7da2b91d/5c8c8424/5c676318/1342154036/VEsH/ "http://www.stackforpa.com")
---

| | I was honored to serve our country and Pennsylvania in the National Guard. And I'm just as honored to be able to help the 850,000 military veterans in our state. I'm committed to ensuring that their transition to civilian life is productive and prosperous. As Lieutenant Governor, **I've created the Veterans Task Force to harness Pennsylvania's resources on serving our veterans -- making sure they find good-paying jobs, helping them utilize their benefits, and providing the health care they earned.** **[](http://action.stackforpa.com/page/m/5fc045fb/7da2b91d/5c8c8424/5c67631f/1342154036/VEsE/ "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AFfQTmQfEJ4")** I want to build on these successes over the next four years. I**would be honored to receive your vote on next Tuesday, May 15**. Together, we can provide veterans and active duty military the support they need. _Mike_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](http://action.stackforpa.com/page/m/5fc045fb/7da2b91d/5c8c8424/5c67631e/1342154036/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mikestack?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2018-05-11-gotv1&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](http://action.stackforpa.com/page/m/5fc045fb/7da2b91d/5c8c8424/5c67631d/1342154036/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mikestack?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2018-05-11-gotv1&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](http://action.stackforpa.com/page/m/5fc045fb/7da2b91d/5c8c8424/5c67631c/1342154036/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mikestack?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2018-05-11-gotv1&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](http://action.stackforpa.com/page/m/5fc045fb/7da2b91d/5c8c8424/5c676303/1342154036/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mikestack?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2018-05-11-gotv1&refcode2=express-buttons")

name: Team Maggie
subject: Betsy DeVos' big fundraiser (in New Hampshire!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf4f/2a380d31/83b9e32/f18518/3001091994/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf4f/2a380d31/83b9e32/f18518/3001091994/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Team --
Betsy DeVos is headed to New Hampshire tomorrow.
You'd think she'd come to listen to the needs of students, families, and teachers, but you'd be wrong. She's coming to headline a MAJOR fundraiser for the New Hampshire GOP.
[**Please give $3 or as much as you're able so that we can respond to DeVos ' fundraiser and send a clear message that her agenda is not welcome.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf4f/2a380d31/83b9e32/f18519/3001091994/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MDUxMl9EZVZvc05IX25oLW5hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20180512_DeVosNH_nh-na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
Betsy DeVos does nothing but funnel money away from public schools, putting hard-working Americans at a huge disadvantage.
She has failed to enforce critical civil rights protections, and her budgeting priorities would make it more difficult for post-graduates to pay off student loans.
DeVos's policies exacerbate the opportunity gap, and they force middle class families to fight with one hand behind their back.
[**We need to make sure Betsy DeVos knows that we do not support her agenda - will you please chip in $3 to help get her agenda out of New Hampshire?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf4f/2a380d31/83b9e32/f18519/3001091994/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MDUxMl9EZVZvc05IX25oLW5hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20180512_DeVosNH_nh-na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
Thank you,
Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf4f/2a380d31/83b9e32/f18519/3001091994/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MDUxMl9EZVZvc05IX25oLW5hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20180512_DeVosNH_nh-na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf4f/2a380d31/83b9e32/f1851a/3001091994/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Concord, NH 03302 United States
